🔒 Privacy Policy

Last updated:

TL;DR: Your health data stays 100% on your device. We don't collect it, can't access it, and don't sell it. Optional anonymous analytics can be disabled anytime.

1. Who We Are

Puff - Your Breathwork Companion ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information when you use our mobile application.

2. Information We Collect

📱 Information Stored Locally (On Your Device)

The following data is stored ONLY on your device and NEVER transmitted to our servers:

  • Cycle tracking data: Last period date, cycle length, menstrual phase
  • Menopause data: Stage selection, symptoms
  • Mood check-ins: Your daily mood selections
  • Session history: Breathing exercises you've completed
  • Settings: App preferences, theme choices

📊 Optional Anonymous Analytics

If you enable analytics (opt-in, can disable anytime), we collect:

  • App usage statistics (opens, session starts/completions)
  • Feature usage (which screens you visit)
  • Program choices (which breathing sessions you select)
  • Technical information (browser type, language, platform)

We NEVER collect: Your name, email, cycle data, symptoms, mood responses, or any health information.

3. How We Use Information

Local data is used solely to:

  • Provide personalized breathing recommendations
  • Track your progress and streaks
  • Remember your preferences

Anonymous analytics (if enabled) are used to:

  • Understand how users interact with the app
  • Identify and fix bugs
  • Improve features and add requested functionality

4. Data Storage & Security

Important: Puff does not require an account. All health data is stored locally on your device using browser storage (localStorage). This means:
  • Your data cannot be synced across devices
  • If you clear browser data, your history is permanently deleted
  • We cannot recover your data if you lose your device
  • No third party can access your health data through our servers (because it's never on our servers)

5. Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services:

  • Analytics: [Plausible/Fathom/PostHog - specify when configured] - Privacy-focused, GDPR compliant
  • App Distribution: Google Play Store - Subject to Google's privacy policies

We do not sell, rent, or share your data with advertisers or data brokers.

6. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access: View all data stored in the app (via Settings)
  • Delete: Delete all your data with one click (Settings → Privacy → Delete All Data)
  • Opt-out: Disable anonymous analytics anytime (Settings → Privacy)
  • Export: [Future feature] Request a copy of your data

7. Children's Privacy

Puff is rated 4+ and is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy in the app and updating the "Last updated" date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

9. Legal Basis for Processing (GDPR)

If you are in the European Economic Area, our legal basis for processing information is:

  • Consent: For optional analytics (you can withdraw consent anytime)
  • Legitimate Interests: For providing and improving core app functionality

10. California Privacy Rights (CCPA)

If you are a California resident, you have the right to:

  • Know what personal data is collected
  • Know if personal data is sold or disclosed (we don't sell data)
  • Opt-out of the sale of personal data
  • Request deletion of personal data

Since all health data is stored locally and we don't sell data, these rights are inherently protected.

11. International Data Transfers

Since we don't transmit your health data to our servers, international data transfer regulations do not apply to your health information. Optional anonymous analytics may be processed in [Your Country/Region].

📧 Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

  • Email: privacy@[yourdomain].com
  • GitHub: github.com/[yourusername]/puff-breathwork

12. Consent

By using our app, you hereby consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its terms.
